ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_days" TEXT /* Days of the week the exchange operates */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price of the stock */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio of the stock */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "open_average" REAL /* Average opening price of the stock */,
  "high_average" REAL /* Average highest price of the stock */,
  "low_average" REAL /* Average lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_average" REAL /* Average closing price of the stock */,
  "volume_average" INTEGER /* Average trading volume of the stock */,
  "adj_open_average" REAL /* Average adjusted opening price of the stock */,
  "adj_high_average" REAL /* Average adjusted highest price of the stock */,
  "adj_low_average" REAL /* Average adjusted lowest price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_average" REAL /* Average adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "vwap_average" REAL /* Average volume-weighted average price of the stock */,
  "split_ratio_average" REAL /* Average split ratio of the stock */,
  "dividend_average" REAL /* Average dividend amount of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekly_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "open_average" REAL /* Average opening price of the stock */,
  "high_average" REAL /* Average highest price of the stock */,
  "low_average" REAL /* Average lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_average" REAL /* Average closing price of the stock */,
  "volume_average" INTEGER /* Average trading volume of the stock */,
  "adj_open_average" REAL /* Average adjusted opening price of the stock */,
  "adj_high_average" REAL /* Average adjusted highest price of the stock */,
  "adj_low_average" REAL /* Average adjusted lowest price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_average" REAL /* Average adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "vwap_average" REAL /* Average volume-weighted average price of the stock */,
  "split_ratio_average" REAL /* Average split ratio of the stock */,
  "dividend_average" REAL /* Average dividend amount of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "open_average" REAL /* Average opening price of the stock */,
  "high_average" REAL /* Average highest price of the stock */,
  "low_average" REAL /* Average lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_average" REAL /* Average closing price of the stock */,
  "volume_average" INTEGER /* Average trading volume of the stock */,
  "adj_open_average" REAL /* Average adjusted opening price of the stock */,
  "adj_high_average" REAL /* Average adjusted highest price of the stock */,
  "adj_low_average" REAL /* Average adjusted lowest price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_average" REAL /* Average adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "vwap_average" REAL /* Average volume-weighted average price of the stock */,
  "split_ratio_average" REAL /* Average split ratio of the stock */,
  "dividend_average" REAL /* Average dividend amount of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volatility" (
  "volatility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the volatility */,
  "open_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the opening price */,
  "high_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the highest price */,
  "low_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the lowest price */,
  "close_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the closing price */,
  "volume_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the trading volume */,
  "adj_open_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the adjusted opening price */,
  "adj_high_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the adjusted highest price */,
  "adj_low_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the adjusted lowest price */,
  "adj_close_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the adjusted closing price */,
  "vwap_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the volume-weighted average price */,
  "split_ratio_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the split ratio */,
  "dividend_volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the dividend amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volatility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volatility_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time of access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "open_change" REAL /* Change in the opening price */,
  "high_change" REAL /* Change in the highest price */,
  "low_change" REAL /* Change in the lowest price */,
  "close_change" REAL /* Change in the closing price */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in the trading volume */,
  "adj_open_change" REAL /* Change in the adjusted opening price */,
  "adj_high_change" REAL /* Change in the adjusted highest price */,
  "adj_low_change" REAL /* Change in the adjusted lowest price */,
  "adj_close_change" REAL /* Change in the adjusted closing price */,
  "vwap_change" REAL /* Change in the volume-weighted average price */,
  "split_ratio_change" REAL /* Change in the split ratio */,
  "dividend_change" REAL /* Change in the dividend amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_changes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation entry */,
  "stock_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first stock being correlated */,
  "stock_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second stock being correlated */,
  "correlation_coefficient" REAL /* Correlation coefficient between the two stocks */,
  "correlation_period" TEXT /* Period over which the correlation is calculated */,
  "correlation_type" TEXT /* Type of correlation (e.g., Pearson, Spearman) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the correlation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_correlations_stock_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id1") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_correlations_stock_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id2") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
